## Products
1. Jwelnex - Jewelry ERP and billing software
2. PayNex - HR and payroll management system
3. SocialNex - Social media analytics and management
4. SchoolDost - Comprehensive school ERP system
5. InventoryNex - Advanced inventory management software

## Services
1. Web Development - Enterprise and custom web applications
2. AI & Data Science - Machine learning, workflow automation, and custom LLMs
3. Recruitment - Technical recruitment and IT staffing solutions
4. SEO Growth - Search Engine Optimization strategies
5. Digital Marketing - Performance marketing and lead generation
6. Corporate Training - Upskilling for engineering and business teams
